baseline_mechanism: Single LLM (deepseek-coder:6.7b) via build_prompt(); no rule engine
critical_finding: Baseline 100% is not from heuristics; it is from reading leaked context.md (Ground truth + merged-tests validation). Ablating validation citations collapses usable non-leaking predictions.

notes.unanimous_high_dependency: HIGH DEPENDENCY on adjudicator rule 'unanimous' is structural: 100/130 rows (all conflicts) resolved unanimously. Ablating it forces escalate and is not evidence of a secret scoring oracle.
notes.baseline_citations: Only 20/130 baseline rows explicitly quote the validation line; 0 quote 'ground truth'. Perfect accuracy still implies the leaked context is available and often used implicitly, especially on compatible controls (15/30 cite validation).
notes.filename_oracle: Filename contains '_compatible' alone yields 100% accuracy without opening any file — directory names encode labels.
